docs.title: Parallel dispatch — the council batch loop
headings: Parallel dispatch — the council batch loop
dispatch ONE Task per unit in batch.units, ALL IN ONE MESSAGE, so they run concurrently:
- inline the persona body: agents/dev.md (role "dev"), agents/architect.md
- fill {{framework}} with unit.framework for dev units
- ground each agent: read spec.md / plan.md / .context/conventions/ first

docs.title: Structural review (pre-stage)
headings: For each merge — `features-merge` unions members/files/entry_points, but it is
scoped to the trivial-feature consolidation pass (--as-section supporting; see
council/18-filter-trivial.md). A structural peer-merge of two communities is not
that case, so surface it for human review rather than forcing a "supporting"
